atoms.reason: The evidence confirms that file X was created at path Y with content matching Z and verified via SHA256.

The evidence explicitly confirms the working tree is clean as required by the post-condition.
The evidence confirms the page exists with the expected title and status, and verifies the ID was correctly stored.
The evidence confirms that the pre-condition was satisfied and all post-condition requirements for health status and check results were met.
The evidence confirms that TKT-0326 has been removed from the source items array and only exists in the target sprint.

The evidence confirms that the specific required report was generated without errors and contains data, satisfying both existence and non-empty requirements.
The evidence shows that the file was not created due to a permission error, failing to meet the post-condition requirements.
The evidence shows that the ALTER TABLE command failed rather than succeeding.

The evidence shows that the script failed the syntax check, meaning the post-condition of an exit code 0 was not met.
The evidence shows modified files that are not staged, which directly violates the requirement for a clean git status.

The script failed to execute successfully, preventing the creation of the required report file.
